basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support - I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Nagpur
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur) Project Technical Support - I Notification 2026 has been released on 11 June 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Nagpur. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support - I Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Three years Graduate Degree (Life science/BMLT/B.Sc. MLT) + one year experience after graduation
qualification.details: Three years Graduate Degree (Life science/BMLT/B.Sc. MLT) + one year experience after graduation.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support - I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support - I Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support - I Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support - I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support - I position is 07-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Three years Graduate Degree in Life science, BMLT, or B.Sc. MLT, along with at least one year of relevant experience after graduation.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Technical Support - I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this recruitment is 28 years. There is no minimum age specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Project Technical Support - I role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two stages: a Screening Test followed by an Interview. Candidates must perform well in both to be considered.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support - I post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 18000 Per Month, plus HRA as per norms.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy for the post of Project Technical Support - I in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the All India Institute of Medical Sciences Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur).

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is AIIMS-NGP/PHY/ANP/25-26/02. It is important to reference this number in your application.
